CustomField.description: This data field relates to the ‘homes completed’ KPI for both schemes. When a home is at the status of complete, it is then classed as ‘upgraded’
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This data field relates to the ‘homes completed’ KPI for both schemes. When a home is at the status of complete, it is then classed as ‘upgraded’
CustomField.label: Total Homes to be Upgraded
